error_signature: unable to create Google Drive credential without server access
title: Creating Google Drive credentials without server access
symptom: Users are unable to create Google Drive credentials for n8n without exposing their server. They seek a secure method to authenticate without direct server access.
applies_when: Using n8n to integrate with Google Drive
root_cause: The standard OAuth2 flow requires user interaction and server access, which can expose sensitive information. Service Accounts provide a secure alternative for server-to-server communication without user involvement.
fix_steps: Create a Service Account in Google Cloud Console.
Enable the Google Drive API for your project.
Generate a JSON key for the Service Account.
Share the Google Drive folder with the Service Account email.
Set up the Google Service Account credential in n8n using the JSON key.
agent_instruction: Follow the steps to create a Service Account and configure it in n8n for Google Drive access.
